step_by_step_instructions: In a large bowl, combine the broccoli slaw mix, raisins, and slivered almonds.
Pour the ranch dressing over the slaw mixture and toss to coat.
Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour before serving.
original_instructions: In a large bowl combine slaw mix, raisins and almonds. Pour the dressing over the slaw mixture and toss to coat. Cover and refrigerate 1 hour before serving.

step_by_step_instructions: Slice the smoked pork sausage into 1/4-inch-thick slices and chop the onion, bell pepper, and celery.
In a dry 2 to 2 1/2-quart heavy saucepan, brown the sausage over moderately high heat, stirring frequently. Transfer to paper towels to drain.
Pour off any fat from the pan. In the same pan, heat the vegetable oil over moderate heat and cook the onion, bell pepper, and celery, stirring occasionally, until the onion is softened.
Stir in the rice, chicken broth, and cayenne. Bring to a boil.
Cover the pan and cook the rice over low heat for 15 minutes.
Remove the pan from heat and let the rice stand, covered, for 5 minutes.
Thinly slice the scallions. Fluff the rice with a fork, then stir in the sausage, scallions, and salt and black pepper to taste.
original_instructions:
Cut sausage into 1/4-inch-thick slices and chop onion, bell pepper, and celery. In a dry 2 to 2 1/2-quart heavy saucepan brown sausage over moderately high heat, stirring frequently, and with a slotted spoon transfer to paper towels to drain. Pour off any fat from pan and in pan cook vegetables in oil over moderate heat, stirring occasionally, until onion is softened. Stir in rice, broth, and cayenne and bring to a boil. Cover pan and cook rice over low heat 15 minutes.
Remove pan from heat and let rice stand, covered, 5 minutes. Thinly slice scallions. Fluff rice with a fork and stir in sausage, scallions, and salt and pepper, to taste.
ingredients: 1 pound smoked pork sausage such as kielbasa
Salt and freshly ground black pepper

step_by_step_instructions: Peel, seed, and chop the cantaloupe. Puree the cantaloupe with the lemon juice in a blender or food processor until very smooth. Transfer to a bowl and chill, covered, for at least 3 hours or overnight.

Peel, seed, and chop the honeydew melon. Puree the honeydew with the lime juice and the minced mint in a blender or food processor until very smooth. Transfer to a bowl and chill, covered, for at least 3 hours or overnight.
Pour equal amounts of both chilled soups into chilled bowls at the same time (using 2 measuring cups). Garnish each serving with sour cream if desired and a mint sprig.
original_instructions: In a food processor or blender puree the cantaloupe with the lemon juice in batches until it is very smooth and in a bowl chill it, covered, for at least 3 hours or overnight. In the food processor or blender puree the honeydew with the lime juice and the minced mint in batches until it is very smooth and in a bowl chill it, covered, for at least 3 hours or overnight. Pour at the same time, using 2 measuring cups, equal amounts of both soups into chilled bowls and garnish each serving with sour cream if desired and a mint sprig.
ingredients: 1 small very ripe cantaloupe, peeled, seeded and chopped coarse
2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice, or to taste
1/2 very ripe honeydew melon, peeled, seeded and chopped coarse
3 tablespoons fresh lime juice, or to taste
1 1/2 teaspoons minced fresh mint, or to taste, plus additional mint sprigs for garnish
Sour cream for garnish if desired

step_by_step_instructions: Finely chop the basil leaves, garlic, and pine nuts on a cutting board, then transfer to a jar.
Add the grated cheese, salt, and 60 ml olive oil, and mix well.
Pour in the remaining olive oil to top up, then mix again until smooth.
original_instructions:
Put basil, garlic, and pine nuts on a cutting board. With a mezzaluna or sharp knife, finely chop the ingredients and add to a jar. Add the Parmigiano cheese, salt, and 1/2 cup olive oil and mix all the ingredients well. Top up with the remaining extra-virgin olive oil.
Cook's Note: Pesto can be served fresh or it can be preserved in the refrigerator or freezer in an air-tight container. If freezing, omit the cheese and drizzle the top with oil. Thaw, then stir in the cheese.
ingredients: Bunch fresh basil leaves, washed and dried
1/2 cup/125 ml freshly grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese

step_by_step_instructions: Whisk together the olive oil, garlic, lime juice, salt, and pepper in a small bowl to make the marinade.
Place the swordfish steaks in a shallow dish or plastic container and pour the marinade over them.
Cover and marinate for 12 to 15 minutes.
Grill or broil the swordfish to desired doneness.
Serve with lime wedges.
original_instructions: Whisk together all the marinade ingredients in a small bowl. Arrange the swordfish, or another strongly flavored fish, such as mahi mahi or Spanish mackerel in a shallow dish or plastic container, pour the marinade over them, cover, and marinate for 12 to 15 minutes. Grill or broil to desired doneness, serve with lime wedges.;
ingredients: 4 (6-ounce) fish steaks (swordfish, mahi mahi, or Spanish mackerel)

step_by_step_instructions: Preheat the broiler.
Brush the salmon with 1 tbsp of the soy sauce. Place on a baking sheet and broil for 10 minutes, or until cooked through.
In a small bowl, whisk together the remaining soy sauce, rice wine vinegar, sesame oil, sugar, ginger, and minced garlic until the sugar is dissolved.
Quarter, pit, and peel the avocado, then cut into 1/2-inch slices.
Add the avocado to the dressing and gently turn with a rubber spatula to coat.
Plate the salmon and divide the avocado and dressing between the portions. Sprinkle sesame seeds over the avocado.
recipe_title: Salmon and Avocado with Sesame Soy Dressing
original_instructions: Preheat broiler. Brush salmon with 1 tablespoon of the soy sauce. Place on a baking sheet and broil salmon for 10 minutes or until it is cooked through. In a small bowl whisk together, remaining soy sauce, rice wine vinegar, lemon juice, oil, sugar, ginger, and a pinch of salt until sugar is dissolved. Quarter pit and peel avocado and cut crosswise into 1/2-inch slices. Add avocado to dressing and gently turn with a rubber spatula to coat. Plate salmon and divide avocado and dressing between them. Sprinkle sesame seeds over avocado.
ingredients: 12 ounce salmon fillet, cut in half
2 teaspoons fresh gingerroot, peeled and grated

step_by_step_instructions: Fill a large saucepan with water and bring to a boil. Slowly lower the eggs into the water one by one using a ladle.
Reduce heat to a low boil and cook the eggs for 10 minutes. Drain the eggs.
When the eggs are cool enough to handle, peel them.
Slice each egg in half lengthwise. Remove the yolks and place them in a food processor.
Arrange the egg whites cut-side up on a serving platter.
To the food processor, add the mayonnaise, yellow mustard, salt, and black pepper. Process until well blended and smooth.
Transfer the yolk mixture to a resealable plastic bag. Snip off a bottom corner and pipe the yolk mixture into the egg whites.
Sprinkle with sweet paprika. Cover loosely and chill until ready to serve.
original_instructions:
Fill a large saucepan with water and bring to a boil. With a ladle, slowly lower the eggs into the water, one by one. Reduce the heat to a low boil and cook for 10 minutes. Drain. When the eggs are cool enough to handle, remove the shells.
Slice each egg in half lengthwise. Remove the yolks and place them in a food processor. Arrange the whites cut-side up on a serving platter. To the food processor, add the mayo, mustard, salt and pepper. Process until well blended and smooth, then transfer to a resealable plastic bag. With scissors, snip off a bottom corner from the bag. Using the bag like a pastry bag, pipe the yolk mixture into the egg whites. Sprinkle with paprika. Cover loosely and chill until ready to serve.

step_by_step_instructions: Place the cabbage, carrot, and green bell pepper in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, corn oil, sour cream, milk, and caraway seeds until smooth. Season with salt and pepper.
Pour the dressing over the cabbage mixture, stir to combine, cover, and chill for at least 4 hours.
Let the coleslaw return to room temperature before serving.
original_instructions:
1. Place the cabbage, carrot and bell pepper in a large bowl. 2. Combine the remaining ingredients in a small bowl and whisk together well. Pour over the cabbage mixture, stir, cover, and chill for at least 4 hours. Allow the slaw to return to room temperature before serving.
1. Place the cabbage, carrot and bell pepper in a large bowl.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients in a small bowl and whisk together well. Pour over the cabbage mixture, stir, cover, and chill for at least 4 hours. Allow the slaw to return to room temperature before serving.
ingredients: 1 small head of green cabbage, cleaned, cored and cut into slivers
1 large carrot, trimmed, peeled and grated
1 medium-sized green bell pepper, stemmed, seeded and grated

step_by_step_instructions: In a very small saucepan, combine 1 tbsp sugar and 1 tbsp water. Bring to a boil, stirring until the sugar dissolves, then boil for 1 minute.
In a small bowl, stir together 2 tbsp golden raisins, 2 tbsp dark rum, and the sugar syrup. Cover and let the raisins plump at room temperature overnight.
Cut the peel from the grapefruits, including all white pith, and cut the fruit sections free from the membranes. Place the sections in a serving bowl.
Pour the rum-raisin syrup over the grapefruit sections and sprinkle with the toasted sliced almonds.
recipe_title: Grapefruit with Golden Raisin Rum Syrup
original_instructions:
Bring sugar and water to a boil in a very small saucepan, stirring until sugar is dissolved, then boil 1 minute. Stir together raisins, rum and sugar syrup in a small bowl, and let raisins plump, covered at room temperature overnight.
Cut peel from grapefruit, including all white pith, with a sharp knife and cut sections free from membranes. Put sections in a serving bowl and pour rum-raisin syrup over them. Sprinkle with almonds.

step_by_step_instructions: Combine cornstarch, sugar, water, and coconut milk in a bowl and stir until smooth.
Stir the mixture over medium heat until thickened.
Lower the heat and continue cooking for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the chopped fresh pineapple.
Pour into a flat pan and refrigerate until set.
original_instructions: Combine cornstarch, sugar, water, and coconut milk. Stir until smooth. Stir over medium heat until thickened. Lower heat and continue cooking for 10 minutes. Stir in fresh pineapple and pour into a flat pan. Refrigerate until set.
